trials.title: Phase III HIV Prevention Trial
trials.description: Evaluating the efficacy of new pre-exposure prophylaxis for HIV prevention in high-risk populations across Latin America.
trials.summary: A large-scale Phase III trial testing next-generation PrEP medication in high-risk populations.

trials.title: Tuberculosis Drug Resistance Study
trials.description: Multi-center study investigating new treatment protocols for drug-resistant tuberculosis in low-income countries.
trials.summary: Investigating novel treatment regimens for MDR-TB across Africa and Asia.

trials.title: Malaria Vaccine Efficacy Trial
trials.description: Testing next-generation malaria vaccine in endemic regions of sub-Saharan Africa.
trials.summary: Phase III efficacy study of a new malaria vaccine candidate in children under 5.

trials.title: COVID-19 Long-Haul Symptom Management Study
trials.description: A longitudinal study examining treatments for persistent COVID-19 symptoms in post-acute sequelae patients.
trials.summary: Exploring effective interventions for long COVID symptoms including fatigue, brain fog, and respiratory issues.
trials.sponsor: National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases

trials.title: Hepatitis C Elimination Program
trials.description: Community-based program testing simplified HCV treatment regimens in rural and peri-urban settings.
trials.summary: Simplified HCV treatment delivery model for underserved rural communities.

trials.title: Dengue Fever Vaccine Phase II Trial
trials.description: Evaluating safety and immunogenicity of a tetravalent dengue vaccine candidate in endemic Southeast Asia.
trials.summary: Testing a novel tetravalent dengue vaccine in adults living in high-transmission zones.

trials.title: Childhood Pneumonia Prevention Study
trials.description: Randomized controlled trial of a novel pneumococcal conjugate vaccine in children under two years.
trials.summary: Evaluating a new PCV formulation to reduce childhood pneumonia mortality in LMICs.

trials.title: Diabetes Management in Sub-Saharan Africa
trials.description: Assessing the effectiveness of a digital health intervention for Type 2 diabetes management.
trials.summary: Mobile-based diabetes self-management program in urban African settings.

trials.title: Mental Health Integration in Primary Care
trials.description: A stepped-wedge cluster trial embedding mental health screening and treatment in primary health care in India.
trials.summary: Integrating mental health services into primary care facilities across rural India.

trials.title: Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance Network
trials.description: Prospective observational study tracking AMR patterns across hospitals in East Africa.
trials.summary: Building an AMR surveillance network across 20 hospitals in Kenya, Tanzania, and Ethiopia.
eligibility: Hospitalized patients with confirmed bacterial infection

forumPosts.title: Navigating Clinical Trial Participation - Your Experience?
forumPosts.content: I recently joined a Phase III HIV prevention trial and wanted to share my experience and hear from others. The screening process was thorough but the coordinators were incredibly supportive.
forumPosts.author: Carlos M.

forumPosts.title: Understanding Informed Consent: Key Questions to Ask
forumPosts.content: As someone who has participated in multiple studies, here are the essential questions I always ask before signing anything. Always ask about the exit procedure and what happens to your data.
forumPosts.author: Dr. Sarah Chen

forumPosts.title: TB Treatment Side Effects - Managing Daily Life
forumPosts.content: Currently on a new TB treatment protocol. Has anyone dealt with similar side effects like nausea and joint pain? Would love to hear how others managed day-to-day.
forumPosts.author: Anonymous User

forumPosts.title: How to Find Trials in Low-Resource Settings?
forumPosts.content: I live in a rural area with limited internet access. Are there offline tools or community health workers who can help me find relevant trials nearby?
forumPosts.author: Aisha D.

forumPosts.title: Vaccine Hesitancy in My Community - How Do You Address It?
forumPosts.content: I work as a community health volunteer and many people in my area are skeptical about vaccine trials. Sharing strategies that have worked for me and looking for more ideas.
forumPosts.author: Kwame A.

forumPosts.title: Malaria Prevention in Children - Trial Update
forumPosts.content: Six months into the Malaria Vaccine Efficacy Trial as a parent of a participating child. The team has been amazing. AMA about the experience.
forumPosts.author: Grace N.

forumPosts.title: Digital Health Tools for Trial Adherence - Which Apps Work?
forumPosts.content: My care team recommended using a mobile app to track medication adherence during my trial. Has anyone had success with digital tools? Which ones actually help?
forumPosts.author: Maria R.

forumPosts.title: Dealing With Stigma Around HIV Trial Participation
forumPosts.content: In my community, people who participate in HIV trials face stigma. How have others dealt with this? It's been one of the hardest parts of my journey.
forumPosts.author: Anonymous User

forumPosts.title: Tips for HCPs Recruiting Diverse Trial Participants
forumPosts.content: Diversity in clinical trials is critical yet challenging to achieve. Here are strategies our clinic uses to ensure underrepresented populations are included.
forumPosts.author: Dr. Priya N.

forumPosts.title: Long COVID Recovery - Sharing My Journey
forumPosts.content: I enrolled in the Long COVID study 3 months ago. The fatigue has improved somewhat but brain fog persists. Happy to share details of the protocol if anyone is curious.
forumPosts.author: David L.

events.title: Strengthening Primary Health Care in LMICs
events.description: Hosted by PHCC, focusing on scaling equitable access to essential health services in low and middle income countries.

events.title: Financing Global Infectious Disease Preparedness
events.description: Organized by GHFC, with experts discussing sustainable funding mechanisms for infectious disease readiness.

events.title: Informed Consent in Clinical Trials
events.description: Led by IDA patient engagement leaders, offering certification for participants and healthcare professionals.

events.title: Global Forum - Vaccine Equity and Access
events.description: Multi-stakeholder event exploring challenges and solutions in vaccine rollout across underserved regions worldwide.

events.title: Annual IDA Conference on Infectious Diseases Advocacy
events.description: A flagship hybrid event with panels, networking, and coalition strategy meetings for advocates and professionals.

events.title: Mental Health and Chronic Disease: Bridging the Gap
events.description: A webinar series exploring the intersection of mental health and chronic disease management in clinical settings.

events.title: AMR Stewardship Training for Clinicians
events.description: Hands-on training for healthcare providers on antimicrobial stewardship programs and best prescribing practices.

events.title: Community Health Workers Summit 2025
events.description: Bringing together CHWs from 40+ countries to share best practices, challenges, and innovations in grassroots health delivery.

resources.title: Clinical Trials 101: A Patient's Guide
resources.description: Comprehensive introduction to clinical trials, patient rights, and what to expect throughout the process.

resources.title: Informed Consent Toolkit for HCPs
resources.description: Best practices and templates for obtaining meaningful informed consent from diverse patient populations.

resources.title: Understanding Antimicrobial Resistance
resources.description: Expert panel discussion on the global AMR crisis, prevention strategies, and what individuals can do.

resources.title: Community Advocacy Handbook
resources.description: Step-by-step guide for grassroots health advocacy, policy engagement, and coalition building.

resources.title: HIV Prevention: What You Need to Know
resources.description: Plain-language guide covering HIV transmission, prevention methods, PrEP, and testing resources.

resources.title: Malaria in Children: A Caregiver's Guide
resources.description: Practical guide for caregivers on recognizing malaria symptoms, seeking treatment, and prevention in endemic areas.

resources.title: Digital Health Literacy for Patients
resources.description: Helping patients use digital tools, telehealth apps, and online health resources safely and effectively.

resources.title: Tuberculosis Treatment Adherence Toolkit
resources.description: Resources for patients and caregivers to support treatment adherence throughout the full TB treatment course.

resources.title: Mental Health First Aid in Low-Resource Settings
resources.description: Training video for community health workers on identifying and providing initial support for mental health crises.

resources.title: Vaccine Safety: Myths vs. Facts
resources.description: Evidence-based resource addressing the most common vaccine myths and safety concerns for patients and advocates.

resources.title: Understanding Your Lab Results
resources.description: Empowering patients to understand common laboratory results and what they mean for their health.

resources.title: HCP Guide to Recruiting Diverse Trial Participants
resources.description: Strategies and tools for healthcare professionals to improve diversity and inclusion in clinical trial recruitment.
